problem id: 38fcbd0c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) AND SHL(4)

examples:
  00111101 -> 01010000
  01100111 -> 01000000
  01001110 -> 10000000
  00000000 -> 00000000
  00100010 -> 00000000
  10101001 -> 00010000
  00011011 -> 00110000
  10000111 -> 00000000

query: 00101010
predicted answer: 00000000
